vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently non-functional. The lack of chlorophyll-bearing tissue indicates total specimen loss. The environment is currently a 'dead' setup.
vision_report.anomalies: The presence of a white rabbit anchor in an otherwise empty pot suggests a decorative or memorial setup rather than an active botanical cultivation.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a complete systemic failure of the botanical collection. Over the observed sequence, the singular sprout identified in the early frames has vanished, leaving the pots empty. The environment is characterized by sterile soil and the absence of any living plant matter. The white rabbit anchor is the only persistent element in the P3/P4 pot.
